rationale: CNAME records from res_nsearch were applied as SRV/TXT records, violating DNS seedlist spec's record-type requirements.
Adding test coverage for readPreferenceTags-as-array behavior per DRIVERS-989; primary action is testing, not fixing driver behavior.
Depends on DRIVERS-686; adding a new FLE corpus spec test to enumerate all BSON encryption axes.
CRUD spec tests incorrectly skipped when sessions support disabled; fixing test runner gating logic, not driver behavior.
Improvement implementing new speculative auth spec feature from DRIVERS-918; driver not previously required to support this.
Updating broken support/community links in driver documentation pages; no spec behavior involved.
Improvement implementing new SDAM spec requirements for topologyVersion and stale error handling per DRIVERS-1187.
Description explicitly says fix needed to 'raise a client-side error to conform with the CRUD specification' for arrayFilters.
CI failure with 'Unequal clusterTimes' on valgrind; likely timing/flaky test, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Adding end-to-end integration tests for OCSP cache behavior against mock responders; test infrastructure addition.
Labeled flaky-tests; timestamp assertion mismatch on valgrind with SIGABRT; timing race in test, no spec violation.
Spec clarification confirmed driver should not add RetryableWriteError label for writes within transaction; driver was doing so.
Description: 'That was removed from the retryable writes spec' — driver still classifying errors by substring match.
Documentation improvement noting allowDiskUse requires 4.4+; depends on DRIVERS-1193; no driver behavior change.
Bug: slow server blocks scans of all others; fix 'better aligns with the server monitoring spec' independent-scanning model.
Reducing default keepalive time to match Azure networking defaults; operational config, not spec-defined behavior.
Compiler warning fix in TRACE macro due to extra NULL argument; build/compilation issue only.
Updating sharded transaction spec test files to avoid unsupported readConcern snapshot; depends on DRIVERS-735.
Echo statement in debian/rules causes debuild error; build/packaging bug with no spec involvement.
Ensuring OCSP and AWS auth CI tests run on both MongoDB 4.4 and latest; CI plumbing for spec tests.
Change streams spec removed ElectionInProgress as resumable error; driver _is_resumable_error still returned true for it.
Removing leftover no-op memmove calls after offset field removal; pure internal refactor, no behavior change.
CI failure on RHEL 6.2 waiting for description count after CDRIVER-3625 changes; infrastructure/timing failure.
Labeled flaky-tests; stepdown test timing failures on Windows; not a spec behavior violation.
Callers assuming non-NULL from internal function; defensive null-check implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Updating connection-pooling docs to reflect new multi-threaded scanning behavior introduced by CDRIVER-3625.
Lowercasing URI options in setter API for internal consistency; programmatic API fix, spec covers string parsing not setters.
Spurious warning logged during client pool destruction with unused session; no spec rule defines this logging behavior.
Uninitialized memory read in SSPI base64 buffer due to missing NULL terminator; memory safety bug, not spec violation.
'According to the sessions spec, estimatedDocumentCount should not support an explicit session parameter' — direct spec citation.
Functions returning false without setting bson_error_t out parameter; internal API contract bug, no spec rule violated.
Ensuring OCSP tests are comprehensive per DRIVERS-1295; CI test coverage improvement for OCSP spec.
Adding ThreadSanitizer to CI to catch threading bugs; build/CI improvement, no spec behavior involved.
Fixing spec test runner to sort outcome collection documents; depends on DRIVERS-1196 for cross-driver consistency.
Improvement implementing spec update DRIVERS-1308 making CursorNotFound a resumable change stream error; new spec requirement.
OCSP HTTP requests missing required Host header; Amazon servers reject them; DRIVERS-1332 raised as spec-level issue.
Adding spec tests to verify ElectionInProgress is not a resumable change stream error; depends on DRIVERS-1318.
Adding 5-second timeout to OCSP requests to prevent server selection timeout; robustness fix, OCSP spec silent on value.
Missing bson_mutex_unlock call introduced in TLS options code; mutex implementation bug, no spec rule involved.
Description: 'transactions should not be inheriting write concerns from the collection' — transactions spec rule violated.
Memory leak in topologyVersion check when SDAM topology_changed callback is set; implementation memory bug.
Memory leak of empty string when AWS_CONTAINER_CREDENTIALS_RELATIVE_URI is empty; implementation memory bug.
Adding test to verify OCSP HTTP requests include Host header; depends on DRIVERS-1332 spec update.
Upgrading Fedora version in RPM build scripts to fix libmongocrypt package availability; build/packaging only.
Stack smashing crash in mongoc_stream_tls_openssl_new with multiple TLS replica set members; memory safety bug.
Test workaround for macOS/Windows Secure Transport IPv6 hostname matching bug; platform-specific test fix.
SDAM integration tests failing with timing issues on Valgrind variant; flaky test infrastructure failure.
Condition variable uninitialized in mongoc_client_pool_new causing potential hang; CMAP spec doesn't specify init details.
CMakeLists.txt redefines message function breaking sub-project inclusion; CMake build system bug, no spec involvement.
Adding test-only mutex lock assertions for internal debugging purposes; no spec behavior change.
